title: Choose WebSockets, SSE, or long polling
meta_description: Compare WebSockets vs SSE vs long polling with real 2026 latency numbers and cost data to pick the right realtime tool for your use case.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick WebSockets for realtime apps and regret it when Cloudflare 429s hit.

SSE is cheaper, simpler, and friendlier to proxies.

Here is the data to decide 👇
